project_area: Resident wellness activities (e.g., paddle boarding, pottery painting, bowling, mini-golf, escape rooms)
demographic_requirements: Residency program must be located in Pennsylvania. At least 25% of residents in the applicant residency program must be members of POMA. Applicant must be a POMA member.
eligibility_summary: Residency programs in Pennsylvania with at least 25% POMA member residents are eligible. Activities must not involve alcohol or high-risk pursuits. Funds cannot cover overhead/F&A costs. Program director must support ongoing wellness activities post-funding.
